# @monorepo/web

<!-- Generated by RepoCanon. Safe to edit by hand; regenerate with `repocanon generate claude .` to refresh inferred sections. -->

## What this is

`@monorepo/web` is a monorepo TypeScript using Next.js project. Treat this file as durable working memory; everything below has been inferred from manifests and file structure, not from the contents of source files.

## Run these

- **install**: `pnpm install`
- **build**: `pnpm run build`
- **test**: `pnpm run test`
- **lint**: `pnpm run lint`

## Rules

- Package isolation: Each package under `apps/`, `packages/` owns its own dependencies and should not reach into another package's internals.

## Layout

- `apps/` — applications (monorepo)
- `packages/` — packages (monorepo)
